mapper.insert: INSERT INTO IP_SDN.TB_NODE SELECT * FROM IP_SDN.TB_NODE_YD

INSERT INTO NIA.TB_ATT_AI_TCA_MODEL (NODE_NUM, IF_NUM) SELECT A.NODE_NUM NODE_NUM, C.IF_NUM IF_NUM FROM RESOURCE.TB_NODE_MST A INNER JOIN ( SELECT LOWER(NODE_NAME) NODE_ID FROM IP_SDN.TB_NODE ) B ON A.NODE_ID = B.NODE_ID INNER JOIN RESOURCE.TB_PORT_MST C ON A.NODE_NUM = C.NODE_NUM
